description: Adds 'Open PowerShell Here' (normal + admin) to the Windows right-click context menu.

messages.scriptDisabled: PowerShell context menu script is disabled in config.
messages.notAdmin: This script must be run as Administrator.
messages.pwshNotFound: '{command}' not found on PATH -- searching known locations...
messages.usingLegacy: Falling back to legacy Windows PowerShell: {path}
messages.noExeFound: No PowerShell executable found. Install pwsh first (script 17).
messages.regDir: Creating context menu entry for FOLDERS...
messages.regBg: Creating context menu entry for FOLDER BACKGROUND...
messages.runasSet: HasLUAShield set -- UAC prompt will appear
messages.done: All PowerShell context menu entries created successfully!
messages.completedWithWarnings: Completed with some warnings -- check output above.
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Package removed, tracking purged.

commands.uninstall: Uninstall completely, remove tracking, clean up
